name: jebbs-print-service
description: Servicio de impresión para Jebbs Burgers

scripts.pkg: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output build/jebbs-print-service.exe
scripts.pkg:all: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64 --out-path build
scripts.pkg:with-assets: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output build/jebbs-print-service.exe
